recommended_frequency.crisis_hotlines: weekly — wrong number during a crisis causes direct harm
recommended_frequency.expungement_laws: monthly — these change through legislature and executive action
recommended_frequency.dui_laws: quarterly — BAC limits and penalties are relatively stable
recommended_frequency.drug_penalties: quarterly — scheduling changes are infrequent but impactful
recommended_frequency.victim_compensation: semi-annually — program changes, funding cuts, URL changes
recommended_frequency.courthouses: annually — addresses and hours change, not the existence

railway_cron.comment: Add to Railway: Settings → Cron Jobs → New Cron Job

alert_on_flag.method: Check exit code: if script exits with code 1, at least one source flagged
alert_on_flag.action_required: Review flagged items, verify against official source, run update_legal_data.js

dui_laws.tertiary: State DMV websites (see url in each state record)

victim_compensation.secondary: Each state program URL (see url column in victim_compensation table)

crisis_hotlines.note: NEVER let these go more than 30 days without verification
